===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Kofu Adventures.png|220px|thumb|Kofu in Pokémon Adventures]]
Kofu debuted in [[PASV25]]. At [[Asado Desert]], he and [[Saguaro]] found {{Violet}} and [[Arven]] in the middle of a battle with the dual Quaking Earth {{pkmn2|Titan}}s, {{p|Great Tusk}} and {{p|Iron Treads}}. Saguaro explained that while on a trip to the [[Kofu Lounge]], he saw Kofu leave to go help find a missing [[Medali Gym|Treasure Eatery]] employee. They found and brought the employee to safety, but had to return to the area to find a left-behind [[Rotom Phone]]. Once Great Tusk was taken out, Kofu and Saguaro lent their aid by keeping Iron Treads in place long enough for Violet and Arven to defeat it as well. The four then enjoyed sandwiches made from the [[Sour Herba Mystica]] that the two Titans were guarding.

Later,<!--In [[PASV32]],--> Kofu was revealed to have been asked by [[Tulip]] to help search for stakes tied to shrines keeping the [[treasures of ruin]] sealed. Katy reported to Tulip that even though Kofu had searched near [[Cascarrafa]], he wasn't able to find a single stake.
{{-}}

|desc={{p|Pelipper}} is Kofu's first known Pokémon. Kofu lent it to {{Violet}} so he could fly to a nearby watchtower [[Arven]] was hiding on top of. When {{p|Great Tusk}} found and attacked Arven, Violet had Pelipper strike with a {{m|Hydro Pump}}. This weakened Great Tusk enough for Violet and Arven to defeat it with their Pokémon.

Pelipper's only known move is {{m|Hydro Pump}}.}}

|desc={{p|Wugtrio}} is Kofu's second known Pokémon. It was first used alongside [[Saguaro]]'s {{p|Hatterene}} to assist {{Violet}} and [[Arven]] battle the {{pkmn2|Titan}} {{p|Iron Treads}}. It used its multiple heads to keep Iron Treads from moving, giving Violet and Arven the opportunity to defeat it with a combined attack from their Pokémon.

None of Wugtrio's moves are known.}}
